start_msg:
👋 Hello! Here you can collect unique cards and compete with other players

How to get cards?
> send "/roll" command

Need help with bot features?
> send "/help" command

Learn all features using /help

help_main:
> 📖 **Bot Help**
> 
> Welcome to our Hentai Gacha! Here you can collect unique cards, earn points, and compete with friends.
> 
> **Main commands:**
> /roll — get a new card
> /profile — your inventory and balance
> /top — group leaderboards
> /globaltop — global leaderboards
> /duel @user bet — challenge to a duel
> /craft — smelt duplicates
> 
> *Choose a section below to learn more.*
help_cards:
> 🎴 **How do cards work?**
> 
> Once every **3 hours** you can use /roll. The bot gives a random card and 🪙 **Points**.
> 
> 🌟 **Fragments:** Mythical cards drop as Fragments. Collect 10 to get a whole card in your inventory!
help_rarities:
> ✨ **Card Rarities**
> 
> ⚪️ **Common**
> 🟢 **Uncommon**
> 🔵 **Rare**
> 🟣 **Epic**
> 🟡 **Legendary**
> 🔴 **Mythical** (Fragment Crafting / Luck)
> 
> The higher the rarity, the higher the card's **Power**, which is useful in duels!
help_streaks:
> 🔥 **Streaks**
> 
> Log in every day and use /roll. Your Streak grows daily, increasing bonus 🪙 **Points** for each roll.
> 
> ⚠️ *If you miss a day, the streak resets.*
help_pity:
> 🛡 **Pity System**
> 
> If you're unlucky for a long time, the **Pity System** activates. Each rare category has a counter: when full, a rare card drops with a **100% chance**.
> 
> When a rare card drops, the counter for that rarity resets.
help_duel:
> ⚔️ **Point Duels**
> 
> Use command: `/duel @username bet`
> 
> **How it works:**
> 1. The bot selects one **random** card from each player's inventory.
> 2. Win chance depends on the **Power** of the selected cards (higher rarity = higher power).
> 3. The winner takes the loser's bet.
help_craft:
> ⚒ **Duplicate Crafting**
> 
> Don't know what to do with extra copies? Use command:
> /craft
> 
> **Crafting Prices:**
> • **5 duplicates** of one rarity = 1 random card of the next rarity.
> • **15 Legendary duplicates** = 1 Mythical card fragment.
> 
> ⚠️ **Important:**
> - The bot automatically uses the cheapest available duplicates.
> - The original card (1 copy) always stays with you; only extra copies are burned.
> - Mythical cards cannot be dismantled.
suggest_err_funds: You need more than 1000 points to suggest a card!
suggest_rules:
> **Suggestion Rules:**
> 
> 💰 Choose wisely, as this service costs **1,000 points** (deducted upon successful submission).
> 
> 🔄 You can suggest **new cards** as well as **replacements for current ones** if you found a better art!
> 
> ⛔️ Jokes, off-topic content, and spam will lead to a ban from the bot.
> 
> ‼️ We will review your submission, but suggesting a card does not guarantee it will be added to the game.
> 
> 👌 It is recommended to send photos in **3:4** format (vertical rectangle), preferably with some empty space around the edges so the frame doesn't cut off the character.
suggest_q1:
**Question 1/3:**

I want to send a funny photo of my classmate, is that okay?
suggest_q2:
**Question 2/3:**

I have a really cool card. If I suggest it, will you 100% add it to the bot?
btn_q2_no: ⛔️ No, but the chance is high
suggest_q3:
**Question 3/3:**

What is the preferred aspect ratio for the photo?
suggest_fail:
❌ **Incorrect answer.**
Please read the rules above carefully and try again.
suggest_success:
> 😹 **Quiz passed!**
> 
> Send your photo (or file), card name, and desired rarity **in a single message (as a caption to the media)**.
> 
> *Cost: 1000 points*
suggest_err_no_caption:
⚠️ **You forgot to add a caption!**
Please resend the photo/file and include the card name and desired rarity in the caption field.
suggest_done:
✅ **Your card has been successfully sent for moderation!**
1000 points deducted from your balance. Thanks for your contribution!

`/link %s`
